description: www.wolfgangstaudt.de Venedig ist eine Stadt im Nordosten Italiens. Sie ist die Hauptstadt der Region Venetien und der Provinz Venedig und traegt den Beinamen La Serenissima (Die Durchlauchtigste). Ihr historisches Zentrum (centro storico) liegt auf einigen groesseren Inseln in der Lagune von Venedig. Die Gesamtflaeche Venedigs betraegt 414,6 qkm, davon entfallen 257,7 qkm auf Wasserflaechen. Am 31. Dezember 2013 zaehlte die Stadt 264.534 Einwohner, davon 181.883 in den Stadtteilen auf dem Festland, 58.901 im historischen Zentrum und 29.674 innerhalb der Lagune. In der Lagune befinden sich 118 Inseln. Sie erstreckt sich ueber etwa 50 km zwischen den Muendungen der Fluesse Adige (Etsch) im Sueden und Piave im Norden in die Adria. From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Queso seco fuerte
tags: venice cheese port dessert restaurant yum dry porto strong 2010 drycheese strongcheese 60225mm alcovo
description:
I'm a bit of a freak when it comes to dessert;  with the exception of being a sucker for flan, I prefer fruit and cheese plates, or on occassion another appetizer or some sashimi.  ;-p

Only after asking for this for dessert did I realize I did so in Spanish.  Oops.  =)

title: Baccala baked in a clay pot with prunes, potatoes, and fresh rosemary

I didn't realize until just now that both dishes I had came with this sprig of fresh rosemary -- but holy crap is that an awesome garnish.

Also, pistachios.

title: Al Covo's Menu
description: I got the "Hostaria" prefix option; a little pricy, but given that the entire menu was included, a nice saving for trying presumably more dishes at slightly smaller portions.

title: Al Covo's Menu -- in Italian
description: For the record, for dessert in my "Hostaria formula," I had a fruit and cheese plate -- I asked for "dry and strong cheeses," but later I realized I did so in Spanish;  I still got what I asked for, for what it's worth.  =)

title: Al Covo's Menu
description: I ordered the "Hostaria formula" pre fix option, and had the "gnocchetti with baby calamari, leeks and coral" (predictably), and the "Baccala baked in a clay pot with prunes, potatoes, and fresh rosemary" (mostly predictably).

title: Querciabella
tags: venice wine january yay chianti 2010 halfbottle tanninbomb 60225mm bottlehalffull alcovo
description: Eating alone, my options are usually limited to either trying to ask if I can take an unfinished bottle of wine home (works more often than you'd think, but I don't bother very often), or more likely, a glass of the house wine.  At Al Covo, the waiter mentioned that they had half bottles -- not knowing nearby Italian wine regions, I just asked for Chianti -- and hey, this stuff was pretty good.  Yay.
